highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 3pm: “My general lean is as long as bulls can hold the megaphone backtest at 5740 (5720 gap fill lowest) we can rally back to 5797, then above there, bulls are back in business and we resume higher to 5815, 5836, then 5850” We saw exactly this today, we filled the Sunday opening gap down to 5720 to the exact tick at 9:40AM, which was the low of day.

post_title: Tomorrow Decides If This Relief Rally Has Legs In SPX. Here's Why. March 28 Plan
